ceremony.title: Ceremony
ceremony.introduction: Join us as we exchange our vows in a beautiful ceremony surrounded by family and friends.

venue.title: Celebration
venue.introduction: After the ceremony, we invite you to celebrate with us at a reception filled with food, drinks, music, and dancing!

rsvp.title: RSVP
rsvp.subtitle: Please confirm your attendance by
rsvp.plusOne: I'd like to bring a plus one
rsvp.notesPlaceholder: Dietary restrictions, message for the couple...
rsvp.successMessage: Your RSVP has been recorded successfully.
rsvp.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

gifts.title: Gifts
gifts.message: The most important thing is that you share this special moment with us. If you'd like to give a gift, we'd be grateful for any contribution to help us build our life together.

transportation.title: Transportation
transportation.byPublicTransportDescription: Metro Line F (orange line) to Rio Tinto station. From there, it's a 15-minute wal (750m). If you come from downtown you can take the yellow line (Line D) to Trindade and change to the orange line (Line F). Last metro to depart from Rio Tinto is around 00:45 AM. Make sure to be there before.
transportation.byPublicTransportDescriptionNote: Buy an Andante card at the metro station machines (€0.60) and charge it with Z3 (€1.85) to travel from downtown Porto to Rio Tinto. Validate it once at the start of your trip and each time you change lines. The ticket is valid for 1 hour, and each person must have their own Andante card with the correct trip.
transportation.byTaxiDescription: Services like Uber or Bolt are readily available throughout Porto. The journey from the city center takes approximately 20 minutes. They are easily available during the night next to the venue. Prices range from 5€ to 10€.
transportation.parkingDescription: Free parking is available for all guests. The parking area is located inside the venue.

accommodation.title: Accommodation
accommodation.subtitle: We recommend these hotels near the venue for your convenience:
accommodation.apartmentsDescription: This is our recommendation, and thanks to our close relationship with the hosts, we’re happy to assist with bookings or any questions.
accommodation.hotel1Description: Modern hotel with comfortable rooms and excellent amenities. Complimentary breakfast included.
accommodation.hotel2Description: Boutique hotel with charming décor and personalized service. Perfect for a relaxing stay.
accommodation.hotel3Description: Family-friendly hotel with spacious rooms and free parking. Great value for money.
accommodation.additionalInfo: We recommend booking your accommodation early, as September is still peak season in Porto. If you’d like recommendations or need help with your booking, we’re more than happy to help.

outro.message: We are so excited to celebrate our love with you and can't wait to see you 💓
